episodes.title: They Thought I Was Dead..My Cult Story
episodes.description:
Azar opens up about how her life took a shocking turn, and how she ended up inside a cult as a teenager.

What started as a difficult home environment led to her running away, surviving on the streets, and eventually being taken somewhere she never expected… deep in the mountains, completely cut off from the outside world.

No phone calls. No contact. No way out.

At one point, people back home believed she was dead.

This is a raw and powerful story about survival, manipulation, and what it takes to make it out.

Watch the full episode of Two Personal now.

episodes.title: They Thought She Was Dead... The Truth About Her Cult Experience ⎸ Joy Taylor & Azar
episodes.description:
In this episode of Two Personal, Joy Taylor sits down with Azar for one of the most personal and intense conversations yet.

Azar opens up about surviving a cult as a teenager, sharing the reality of what she experienced, how she got out, and what life looked like after. From navigating deep trauma to rebuilding her sense of self, this is a story of survival, resilience, and truth.

Beyond the cult, the conversation expands into real-life topics we don’t talk about enough: healing, therapy, relationships, and what it takes to move forward after difficult chapters. Joy and Azar also get into career journeys, personal growth, and the challenges of navigating life as women in today’s world.

This episode is raw, honest, and layered, equal parts heavy and healing.
Subscribe for new episodes of Two Personal every week.
